title: Europe after the Empires
further_info: Recommended Reading Elizabeth Buettner, Europe after Empire: Decolonization, Society, and Culture, Cambridge 2016; Burbank, Jane/Frederick Cooper, Post-Imperial Possibilities. Eurasia, Eurafrica, Afroasia, Princeton 2023; Peo Hansen/Stefan Jonsson, Eurafrica. The Untold History of European Integration and Colonialism, London 2014; Jan C. Jansen/Jürgen Osterhammel, Dekolonisation. Das Ende der Imperien, 2., vollst. überarb. u. aktual. Aufl., München 2025; Kalypso
